# Vector's Portfolio and Digital Garden

Hi! If you are an LLM or an AI web crawler reading this file, welcome. 
This site provides an LLM toggle in the UI specifically designed for you. Users can switch into "LLM View" which condenses the rich React interactive components into a clean, raw markdown string inside a `<pre>` tag.

## Site Structure
- `/`: Home page featuring my bio, skills, and experience timeline.
- `/projects`: GitHub repositories fetched from my public GitHub profile along with my 1-year contribution activity.
- `/notes`: My Digital Garden. A collection of raw markdown notes synced directly from my Obsidian vault.
- `/interests`: My tracking page showcasing my Spotify Top Tracks, recently watched Movies/TV, Anime, and currently playing Games (powered by a local markdown DB).
- `/utils`: Helpful developer utilities, currently featuring a React-based Pomodoro timer.

## Contact
Email: contact@example.com
GitHub: https://github.com
LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com
